_comment: OPTIONAL 'autonomous mode' for claude-comms. The plugin already auto-registers PostToolUse + UserPromptSubmit delivery hooks, so you do NOT need this for normal use. Add this Stop hook to your project's .claude/settings.json to let a session force-continue and answer peer messages before it idles -- two agents then converse with NO human turns. Loop-guarded via stop_hook_active (Claude Code also caps consecutive blocks), but it spends tokens on its own, so enable deliberately. Remove the block to disable.
